senses.definition: as the pace one prefers,  even though others expect one to act faster

examples.x: He finished the project in his sweet time, much to the frustration of his team.
They will likely respond to the email in their sweet time, so we have to be patient.

senses.definition: used to refer to a suitable time in which a particular activity can be done
exactly on the desirable or expected time

examples.x: The actor delivers his lines on cue, showcasing his impeccable timing.
The comedian is delivering his jokes on cue, keeping the audience laughing.
The doorbell rang right on cue, announcing the arrival of the surprise party guests.
Just as the sun began to set, the birds started singing their evening song right on cue.
The actor entered the stage right on cue, perfectly timed with the music and lighting cues.

senses.definition: at a place or time that one is comfortable with

examples.x: Please let me know when it is at your convenience to discuss the project.
We can schedule the appointment at your convenience.
You can complete the form at your convenience; there is no rush.
She contacted us and said she would return the call at her convenience.
They arranged a meeting at their convenience last week.
He provided the requested information at his convenience.
I will send you the report to review at your convenience.
They promised to deliver the package at our convenience tomorrow.
If you could kindly respond at your convenience, we can proceed with the next steps.

senses.definition: exactly at a time that is expected or decided upon

examples.x: The train always arrives on the dot, never a minute late.
She finished her presentation right on the dot, exactly at the allocated time.
The meeting will start at 9:00 AM on the dot, so be sure to arrive on time.
He is running to catch the bus, hoping to arrive on the dot for his appointment.
They were waiting outside the restaurant, as the doors opened on the dot at 6:00 PM.
By this time tomorrow, they will be boarding the plane on the dot.
The project team has consistently met deadlines, delivering results on the dot.
She had left the office at 5:00 PM on the dot when her colleague called with an urgent request.

senses.definition: completing or achieving something just before a deadline

examples.x: She always manages to complete her assignments just under the wire.
They submitted their application right under the wire, minutes before the deadline.
We will finish the project just under the wire, ensuring timely delivery.
They were working feverishly to finish the construction under the wire.
The team has consistently delivered results right under the wire.
She had submitted the proposal just under the wire when they announced the deadline extension.
